block_00: The Arnaud Legoux Moving Average — Responsive and Smooth
block_01: Not a fan of moving averages? Maybe you just haven’t met the smoothest and most responsive moving average of them all: The Arnaud Legoux Moving Average.
block_02: Also known as ALMA, this indicator was created to address the limited capabilities found in most moving averages. This means you don’t have to choose between responsiveness and smoothness — with ALMA, you can have both.
block_04: Trading with a Unique Volatility Indicator — Donchian Channels
block_05: Traders turn to this versatile indicator to understand how bullish or bearish the market currently is. You can use it on its own or pair it up with other indicators. Either way, it’s worth a try.
block_08: Everyone knows that inflation can have a tremendous effect on the economy. Did you know it can also affect your trading? Find out how in this article.
